arn.description: Amazon Resource Name used for IAM policies and API interactions

create_time.description: Timestamp indicating when the cache was created

endpoint.description: Primary endpoint for connecting to the serverless cache

full_engine_version.description: Specifies the detailed engine version of the cache

status.description: Current operational status of the serverless cache

tags_all.description: Comprehensive set of tags associated with the resource
